# Ingestion Test Fixtures

This directory contains committed fixtures shared by ingestion unit tests.

- `convert/`: Source files for conversion tests.
- `discovery-techdocs/`: File tree for `tech-docs-template` discovery behavior.
- `discovery-markdown/`: File tree for markdown/mdx discovery behavior.
- `assets/docs/`: Docs tree with sample local assets used by asset-reference tests.

Use these fixtures for read-only tests so setup code stays small and consistent.
